w:r.w:t: Project Title: “Research on Digital Intelligence Technologies Empowering Healthcare: Current Status, Trends, and Policy Implications for China’s Medical Reform”
(Sponsored by the China Health Economics Association)
- Led a comparative analysis of DIT policies, practices, and outcomes in the U.S. and Japan to identify transferable strategies for China
- Systematically analyzed 20+ key policies, delivered an over 10,000-word policy analysis report, wrote two national strategic analysis reports on medical AI and digital transformation
- Was proficient in using AI tools
National College Students' Innovation and Entrepreneurship Training Program
The Intangible Cultural Heritage at Your Fingertips – Digitalization and Interactive Program
- Received university-level key project funding (acceptance rate < 15%)
- Assembled a 4-member cross-disciplinary team to achieve the core objective of
National Cybersecurity CTF (Capture The Flag) Competition (August 2024 - Present)
- Gained preliminary understanding of VM configuration
- Performed basic Linux system operations (Kali Linux)
China Undergraduate Mathematical Contest in Modeling
- 72-hour time-limited competition requiring end-to-end mathematical modeling solutions for open-ended problems
- As modeler, completed algorithm development using MATLAB
I am an optimistic, enthusiastic, and diligent learner with excellent academic performance. I
have a strong passion for computer technology and strong proficiency in the core areas of my major. I possess foundational knowledge in C programming, excellent communication skills,
C, MATLAB, Visual Studio, C-Free, AI Tools
